name: Oregon Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Oregon - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.streetAddress:
1430 Tansy Boegel Rd. SE, Suite 220
Salem, OR 97302
address.description: Oregon Health Licensing Office, PO Box 14470, Salem, OR 97309-5077

renewalCycle: Annual + 15 CE hours (plus 1 hr cultural competency every other year)

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Verification
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration.

requiredDocuments.name: Official Transcripts
requiredDocuments.description: Sent directly from the university showing your conferred degree.

requiredDocuments.name: Background Check Authorization
requiredDocuments.description: Fingerprint cards and authorization for the HLO background check.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does an Oregon dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial cost is $110, which includes a $50 application fee and a $60 license fee. There are additional fees for the fingerprint-based background check.

mainEntity.name: When does the Oregon license need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Oregon dietitian license is renewed annually. The renewal fee is $60.

mainEntity.name: What are the continuing education requirements for Oregon?

acceptedAnswer.text: Oregon requires 15 continuing education (CE) hours every year. In addition, beginning with your second renewal, 1 hour of cultural competency CE is required every other year.

mainEntity.name: Does Oregon have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers dietitian practice in Oregon. To work in Oregon, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Oregon?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 3 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Oregon while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most applicants need to wait for full approval before starting work because the state does not clearly offer a temporary or provisional credential.
